subcodes.first_line: The Holy Spirit standeth ready and the human spirit waiteth expectantly - when shall the melody of light be mentioned and the note of manifestation be sounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روح القدس مترصد و روح الانس منتظر که نغمه نور کی مذکور شود و نقره ظهور کی
subcodes.subjects: @meanings of letters and numbers; jafr (gematria), @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @The Holy Spirit
